checks.name: quality_matrix
checks.detail: 20 base scenarios and 5 variants were checked in local deterministic mode.

checks.name: document_forms
checks.detail: Risk assessment, work plan, permit, TBM briefing, TBM log, and education records use distinct safety-form structures. HWPX is text-structured output, not original-cell reproduction.

checks.name: archive_reuse
checks.detail: Archive and reuse paths are present. Full behavior depends on Supabase login and deployment environment variables.

checks.name: dispatch
checks.detail: Email and SMS are the v1 active channels. Kakao and Band remain locked until approval.

checks.name: security_privacy
checks.detail: Minimum worker fields are defined. Production RLS must be checked in Supabase before paid pilot onboarding.

notices: Browser print is the v1 PDF flow.
HWPX original-cell reproduction is not claimed in v1.
Production Supabase history requires valid login and RLS policies.
Kakao and Band are not part of the v1 submission gate.
